zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de La Guerche於大約1260年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易普瓦瑟時，她的父親Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE46歲，母親Anne de Montmorency41歲。她於1272年與Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年1月19日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延a奧-恭艾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de La Guerche于大约1260年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易普瓦瑟时，她的父亲Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE46岁，母亲Anne de Montmorency41岁。她于1272年与Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年1月19日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延a奧-恭艾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de La Guerche was born about 1260, in Pouancé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE, was 46 and her mother, Anne de Montmorency, was 41. She married Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont in 1272, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 January 1290, in Château-Gontier, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de La Guerche est née environ 1260, à Pouancé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anne de Montmorency, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont en 1272, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1290, à Château-Gontier, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 31 ans.

Sie hat 1272 in Frankreich Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de La Guerche è nata il circa 1260 nel Pouancé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Anne de Montmorency, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont nel 1272, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1290, nel Château-Gontier, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de La Guercheが約1260年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーポウアンクeで生まれた時，父Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHEは46歳，母Anne de Montmorencyは41歳であった。1272年にフランスでJean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年1月19日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンチaテアウ-ゴンティエルで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de La Guerche(이)가 대략 1260년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 파우아ce에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de Montmorency(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1272년 프랑스에서 Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 1월 19일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 cha테오-곤티어에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de La Guerche nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Pouancé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Montmorency, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont em 1272, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1290, em Château-Gontier, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de La Guerche родилась около 1260 г. в местности поуанкe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Montmorency, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont в 1272 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 января 1290 г. в местности чaто-гонтиир, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de La Guerche nació aproximadamente 1260, en Pouancé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Guillaume IV DE LA GUERCHE, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anne de Montmorency, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont en 1272, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1290, en Château-Gontier, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 31 años.
